message:
fix: 4 test failures in searcher and filesystem_chaos

searcher: next_telemetry_identifier_is_uppercase_crockford_base32
  Test expected 26-char ULID but function produces "evt_" prefix + 26
  chars = 30. Fixed assertion to account for prefix; validate only the
  ULID body for Crockford base32 charset.

searcher: host_adapter_receives_refinement_failed_search_event
  RefinementFailed telemetry reported initial_hits.len() (full pipeline
  count) instead of display_hits.len() (limit-truncated). This caused a
  mismatch when limit < total results. Fixed both RefinementFailed emit
  sites to use display_hits.len(), consistent with Initial event.

searcher: refined_phase_uses_zero_fast_score_for_lexical_only_candidates
  Quality refinement unconditionally relabeled all quality-scored results
  as SemanticQuality, overwriting Lexical provenance. Lexical-only results
  that receive a quality rerank score should retain their Lexical source.
  Fixed source assignment to preserve original provenance for lexical hits.

filesystem_chaos: scenario_cli_chaos_mount_boundary_binary_run
  Mount boundary detection requires /proc/mounts (Linux-only).
  read_system_mounts() returns empty Vec on macOS, so the mount override
  config has no effect and files are never skipped. Gated both mount
  boundary tests with #[cfg(target_os = "linux")].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
